BK.name: The Bank of New York Mellon Cor
BK.thesis: BK is one of the highest-quality setups in our universe right now with a score of 94.2. It's in a confirmed Stage 2 uptrend and has formed a VCP with 3 contractions (tightest: 2.5%) — the textbook pre-breakout coiling that Minervini built his career on. The RS line is at new highs — this stock is leading the market, not just riding it. With earnings 7 days away, this is in the optimal pre-earnings catalyst window. Strong growth stocks often run 10-20% into their report. Fundamentals back it up: EPS +42% and revenue +13% YoY — the kind of numbers that attract institutional money. Trade setup: entry at $146.62, stop at $134.89 (–8%), target $175.94 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.
key_strengths: confirmed Stage 2 uptrend (price $146.62 above MA50 $139 and MA200 $121)
